meta.title: The Future of U.S.-Nigeria Relations: A Conversation with Ambassador John Campbell
meta.description: Join Ambassador Campbell and Hudson Institute Research Fellow James Barnett for a discussion of contemporary Nigerian politics, the challenges of post-colonial state-building, and the future of U.S.-Nigeria relations.
